channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Progressive Senators Push to Ban Super PAC Money in Democratic Primaries
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders is leading a group of liberal senators in urging Democratic Party leadership to prohibit super PAC involvement in primary elections.

item.title: Second Alleged Assassination Attempt Against Trump Follows Media Controversy
item.description: Critics argue that media coverage framing political violence as acceptable may contribute to an environment that emboldens those who target public figures.

item.title: New FBI Clinton Document Raises Questions About Equal Application of Justice
item.description: Newly released FBI documents are cited by some observers as evidence of alleged pay-to-play activity and inconsistent standards within the Justice Department.

item.title: CBS Anchor Norah O'Donnell Criticized for Remarks Following Terrorist Attack
item.description: O'Donnell's on-air comments following a terrorist attack drew criticism from those who viewed her language as politically charged toward the president.
